nasb.text: Jonathan said, “Far be it from you! For if I should indeed learn that evil has been decided by my father to come upon you, then would I not tell you about it?”

esv.text: And Jonathan said, “Far be it from you! If I knew that it was determined by my father that harm should come to you, would I not tell you?”

cnv.text: 約拿單說：“絕對沒有這事，如果我知道我父親決意要害你，我會不告訴你嗎？”

ccb.text: 约拿单答道：“我决不会这样做。如果我知道我父亲决意要杀你，我怎能不通知你呢？”
